principles.name: INCENTIVOS GOBIERNAN COMPORTAMIENTO
principles.description: Not intentions. To predict what someone will do, look at what they gain by doing it.
principles.shadow: Believing speeches. Designing systems based on goodwill.

principles.name: TODA ELECCION CUESTA LO QUE NO ELEGISTE
principles.description: Opportunity cost. The real price is not what you pay, it's what you stop doing.

principles.name: LA SIGUIENTE UNIDAD IMPORTA, NO EL PROMEDIO
principles.description: Marginal thinking. The decision is always: is the NEXT step worth it?
principles.shadow: Deciding by averages when the margins have already shifted.

principles.name: SIN CONSECUENCIAS, SENALES SON RUIDO
principles.description: Skin in the game. Whoever opines without risking produces unverified maps.
principles.shadow: Taking advice from someone who doesn't pay the cost of being wrong.

principles.name: OBSERVA LO QUE HACEN, NO LO QUE DICEN
principles.description: Revealed preference. Real action declares real VB, not discourse.
principles.shadow: Self-deception (your map says one VB, your behavior reveals another).

principles.name: PERDER DUELE EL DOBLE DE LO QUE GANAR AGRADA
principles.description: Loss aversion. The brain weighs losses ~2x more than equivalent gains.
principles.shadow: Not acting from fear of losing what you have. Or not releasing what no longer serves.

principles.name: HUMANOS OPTIMIZAN POSICION RELATIVA, NO ABSOLUTA
principles.description: Status. Not how much you have, but how much relative to your reference group.
principles.shadow: Competing in games you didn't choose. Comparing with those who don't share your VB.

principles.name: HUMANOS NECESITAN NARRATIVAS; REALIDAD NO LAS PROVEE
principles.description: Narrative fallacy. The brain fabricates coherent stories from insufficient data.
principles.shadow: Confusing the story you tell yourself with what territory shows.

principles.name: QUIEN ACTUA POR TI OPTIMIZA PARA SI PRIMERO
principles.description: Agency problem. Employees, advisors, politicians, managers: their VB is not your VB.
principles.shadow: Delegating without auditing. Trusting by default.

principles.name: CAPACIDAD DE RETRASAR GRATIFICACION PREDICE CASI TODO
principles.description: Time preference. Choosing future over present is the base operation of all accumulation.
principles.shadow: Consuming the expansion capital of the future valuing self (vice per ethical chain).

principles.name: COOPERACION EMERGE EN JUEGOS REPETIDOS; DEFECCION EN UNICOS
principles.description: If you will see someone again, cooperation pays. If not, it has no anchor.
principles.shadow: Treating continuous relationships as single transactions (or vice versa).

principles.name: ASIMETRIA DE INFORMACION CREA PODER
principles.description: Whoever knows more controls the negotiation.
principles.shadow: Not investing in knowing. Or believing you know when you haven't verified.
